titleStmt.title: SII 31.203: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 203. (A.R. No. B 205 of 1938.) CHIḌIPIRĀLA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the Kitchen in the Agastyēśvara temple.
This epigraph is dated in Śaka 147[2], Sādhāraṇa, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 11 corresponding to July 24, 1550 A.D.

It registers the gift derived from the Vīramushṭhi by Siddha Bhikshavitti Nandēla Virayya for lamp offering to the temple of Agastyēśvara. The donee Nandēla Virayya is endowed with the titles like Khētāmbara guṇḍuganḍa Bijanarāya māmardana shaḍdarsana stāpanāchāryya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1472
Agunēṭi sādhāraṇa saṁvasta(tsa)ra śrāvaṇa śu 11 lu śrīpa¨rvva
ta śrīsvayaṁbhu śrīliṁgacakrava¨rttikhētāṁbaraguṁḍu gaṁ
ḍa bijjanarāyamānama¨rddana ṣaḍadariśana stāpanacā¨ryyamūṁ
ḍurāyalaprajaliṁga śrīvīraśaiva sidhabhikṣāvatayyavāru saṁ
dēla vīrayyaṁgāru yiccina kānā(ṇā)ci kramameṭlaṁnnanu mī
Agastēsva(śva)dēvuni Āragiṁpuvēḷa dīpārāthanaku Idēva
stānāṁnu grāmānaṁnu vīramuṣṇaku cēlle va¨rtana
Āgastēśvaruniki dhāravōsi yistini . yī dha¨rmānaku ya
varu tappinānu divāsṛtivi mahattuku taputa bhikṣā
va(vṛ)ttiki taputa tamaguruvunu vāraṇāsilōnu
vadhiṁstidōśā(ṣā)nu juṁjunavēyarādu .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ
paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 31.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
